message:
feat: add benchmark suite and performance target tests

- Implement comprehensive Criterion benchmarks for search operations:
  - Hash embedding (various input sizes and batches)
  - RRF fusion (various ranking sizes and overlap)
  - Vector search (various index sizes and result limits)
  - Constrained packing (various slice counts and budgets)
  - Cosine similarity (single and batch)

- Add CI regression tests in tests/unit/perf_target_tests.rs
  with relaxed thresholds for test profile

- Add CLI command parse tests (config, diff, fmt, edit, alias,
  bandit, cm, migrate, pre-commit, quality, security, test,
  update, validate)

All performance targets from meta_skill-ftb spec are met:
- hash_embedding: ~700ns (target < 1μs)
- rrf_fusion: ~46μs (target < 10ms)
- packing: ~28μs (target < 50ms)
- vector_search: ~317μs (target < 50ms)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
